name: Josh Potter
blurb: He became widely known through his work on the Your Mom's House podcast with Tom Segura and Christina P., which led to his own program, The Josh Potter Show.
bio: Josh Potter is an American stand-up comedian and podcaster from Buffalo, New York, who began his career in morning radio before moving into comedy. He became widely known through his work on the Your Mom's House podcast with Tom Segura and Christina P., which led to his own program, The Josh Potter Show. He performs stand-up nationally and is based in Los Angeles.

timeline.ev: Becomes a fixture on the Your Mom's House podcast
